Uses of Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.SaveOptions

  • Uses of SaveOptions in cc.quaternion.potshaper

    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper that return SaveOptions
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SaveOptions
    SaveOptions.backupPath(String path)
    Sets a custom file system path for the backup file.
    SaveOptions
    SaveOptions.bufferSize(int size)
    Sets the buffer size in bytes used during processing operations.
    SaveOptions
    SaveOptions.cleanMetadata(boolean clean)
    Enables or disables cleaning of personal and sensitive metadata.
    SaveOptions
    SaveOptions.compressMedia(boolean compress)
    Enables or disables compression of embedded media.
    SaveOptions
    SaveOptions.createBackup(boolean backup)
    Enables or disables creation of a backup copy of the original file.
    static SaveOptions
    SaveOptions.forWeb()
    Creates a SaveOptions instance pre-configured for web delivery.
    static SaveOptions
    SaveOptions.highCompression()
    Creates a SaveOptions instance pre-configured for high compression.
    SaveOptions
    SaveOptions.optimizeForWeb(boolean optimize)
    Enables or disables optimization for web delivery.
    SaveOptions
    SaveOptions.removeMacros(boolean remove)
    Enables or disables removal of macros from the presentation.
    static SaveOptions
    SaveOptions.safe()
    Creates a SaveOptions instance pre-configured for safe operations.
    SaveOptions
    SaveOptions.validate(boolean validate)
    Enables or disables validation of the presentation structure before saving.
    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper with parameters of type SaveOptions
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PotPresentation.save(File file, SaveOptions options)
    Saves the presentation to the specified file with additional options.
    void
    PotPresentation.save(OutputStream outputStream, SaveOptions options)
    Saves the presentation to the specified output stream with additional options.
    void
    PotPresentation.save(String path, SaveOptions options)
    Saves the presentation to the specified file path with additional options.
